svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="OynyY0etpmw3ZarKGT8K"> <mxGraphModel dx="2357" dy="1248" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant C as Client
 participant AC as AuthController
 participant AS as AuthService
 participant DB as PostgreSQL

 C->>AC: POST /auth/login
 AC->>AS: login(email, password)
 AS->>DB: find user by normalized email
 alt user missing or password invalid
 AS-->>AC: UnauthorizedException
 AC-->>C: 401 invalid credentials
 else valid credentials
 AS->>AS: bcrypt compare
 AS->>AS: issue access and refresh JWTs
 AS->>DB: store refreshTokenHash
 AS-->>AC: user + tokens
 AC-->>C: 200 AuthResponse
 end
",
 "config": null
}" id="cy5-3Th3e6YrIVTDAqyU-1"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=10;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
